Torq AMP, which stands for Alliance and Momentum Partners, features prestigious launch companies including Google Cloud, Wiz, Zscaler, Anvilogic, Armis, Astrix Security, Cyera, Intezer, NVIDIA, Panther, Reco, Silverfort, Sweet Security, and Veeam.
